name: US Cash Advance
description_short: Jacksonville's US Cash Advance location on Old St Augustine Road provides fast cash advances and title loans during extended hours.
description_long:
US Cash Advance in Jacksonville is located at 10561 Old St Augustine Road Suite G, easily accessible for Jacksonville residents. The storefront operates with convenient extended hours: Monday through Friday 8AM to 9PM, and Saturday and Sunday 10AM to 7PM, making it easy to visit at times that work with your schedule.

At this Jacksonville, FL location, you can access payday loans and title loans designed for quick cash needs. The team can help guide you through the application process and answer questions about loan terms. Contact the store directly at 904-785-8414 to discuss your options or get details about available services.

If you're a Jacksonville resident needing quick cash, bring a valid ID, proof of income, and a blank check or bank statement. US Cash Advance makes the process straightforward and fast.
address: 10561 Old St Augustine Rd Suite G, Jacksonville, FL 32257

company_info.headquarters: 10561 Old St Augustine Rd Suite G, Jacksonville, FL 32257

pros: In-person service with reported processing times under 45 minutes to 2 hours
Accepts all credit types including bad credit applicants
Extended hours (8am–9pm weekdays, 10am–7pm weekends) for working individuals
Multiple loan products ranging from $100 to $50,000
Staff receives specific praise for transparent fee disclosure and patient explanations
cons: Website contains no specific APR, interest rate, or fee disclosure—critical terms are opaque
Heavy reliance on third-party lenders obscures actual terms and conditions
High-cost debt product category with typical industry APRs exceeding 300%
Limited online functionality (reviews mention lack of online pre-approval despite online application option)
Physical location constraint limits accessibility to Detroit-area residents
best_for: Individuals in the Detroit area needing same-day or next-day emergency cash ($100–$1,000)
Consumers with poor credit history who are unable to qualify for traditional bank loans
Borrowers facing urgent expenses (medical bills, car repairs) who prefer in-person consultation
diagnosis: US Cash Advance is best for Detroit-area residents requiring immediate cash ($100–$1,000) who lack access to traditional credit and can tolerate high-cost short-term borrowing. The primary caveat is the complete absence of disclosed terms—APR, fees, and repayment schedules are not provided online, requiring in-person consultation to understand true borrowing costs before commitment.
meta_description: US Cash Advance at 10561 Old St Augustine Road, Jacksonville, FL. Fast payday and title loans with extended hours.
